description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Qlik Replicate task by enumerating the workspace via the Qlik Enterprise Manager REST API. StateBackedComponent — discovery is cached to disk and refreshed on explicit trigger, not on every project load. Materializing an asset triggers the underlying task (run / reload / stop) and polls to completion. The workspace-shape peer of the low-level qlik_replicate_task_trigger_job / qlik_replicate_task_status_sensor / qlik_replicate_task_metrics_ingestion components — use this when you want one YAML instead of one-per-task.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with the Enterprise Manager base URL (e.g. https://qlikem.acme.com). No trailing slash.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with EM username (session-based auth). Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with EM password (session-based auth). Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

api_token_env_var.label: API Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with an EM API token. Preferred for production.

servers.label: Servers Filter
servers.description: Optional whitelist of Replicate server names. Omit to include all servers.

task_selector.label: Task Selector
task_selector.description: Filter tasks emitted as assets. Object with by_name (exact) / by_pattern (glob) / exclude_by_name / exclude_by_pattern. Omit to include all tasks. Mirrors FivetranWorkspace's connector_selector.

asset_key_prefix.label: Asset Key Prefix
asset_key_prefix.description: Prefix segments prepended to every emitted asset key. Final key = [...prefix, server, task].

compute_kind.label: Compute Kind
compute_kind.description: Dagster asset compute_kind for UI display.

action.label: Action on Materialize
action.description: What each asset does when materialized.

run_option.label: Run Option
run_option.description: For action=run: RESUME_PROCESSING | RELOAD_TARGET | RECOVER | RESUME_PROCESSING_FROM_TIMESTAMP

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout (s)
timeout_seconds.description: Give up polling after this many seconds.

defs_state.label: Defs State Config
defs_state.description: StateBackedComponent config. Set management_type: LOCAL_FILESYSTEM for dev, CLOUD_OBJECT_STORE for Dagster+.
